zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton於1461年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton40歲，母親Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton36歲。他於大約1488年與Lady Johane Fogge of Repton在英國德比夏爾雷普頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年11月9日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton于1461年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton40岁，母亲Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton36岁。他于大约1488年与Lady Johane Fogge of Repton在英国德比夏爾雷普頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年11月9日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton was born in 1461, in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton, was 40 and his mother, Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton, was 36. He married Lady Johane Fogge of Repton about 1488, in Repton, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 November 1506, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton est né en 1461, à Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Johane Fogge of Repton environ 1488, à Repton, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1506, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton 1461 in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton 40 und seine Mutter Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton 36. Er hat um 1488 in Repton, Derbyshire, England Lady Johane Fogge of Repton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1506 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton è nato il nel 1461 nel Norton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Johane Fogge of Repton circa 1488, nel Repton, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1506, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Nortonが1461年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Nortonは40歳，母Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughtonは36歳であった。約1488年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアレプトンでLady Johane Fogge of Reptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年11月9日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton(이)가 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국 더비실르 레프턴에서 Lady Johane Fogge of Repton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 11월 9일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton nasceu em 1461, em Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Johane Fogge of Repton aproximadamente 1488, em Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1506, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton родился в 1461 г. в местности нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Johane Fogge of Repton около 1488 г. в местности рептон, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 ноября 1506 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Grene V of Grene's Norton nació en 1461, en Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Grene IV of Grene's Norton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Johane Fogge of Repton aproximadamente 1488, en Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1506, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
